name: bug_review_surface_ux
outcome_goal: Validate framing/scope of 44 Surface UX & product behavior bugs in Praxis.db; flag suspect writeups including auto-generated cockpit noise; produce ranked tackle plan.

jobs.label: review_surface_ux_bugs
jobs.prompt:
You are reviewing a group of bugs in Praxis.db that may have been filed by lower-tier models. The operator is worried that some writeups are misleading or scoped wrong, and that following them blindly could cause a builder to ship the wrong fix. Validate each bug before treating it as authoritative.

Group: Surface UX & product behavior (44 bugs; P1=8, P2=35, P3=1)
Bug IDs:
BUG-2729F8B7 BUG-37D18B71 BUG-3CC5D3AD BUG-46A6C7F2 BUG-5DD67C2A BUG-71AE925E BUG-9BB04947 BUG-A274AEBC BUG-010C811D BUG-1350534F BUG-1A4029F2 BUG-1D781196 BUG-22B49805 BUG-25EF566B BUG-3330D2CD BUG-363F16A6 BUG-5861F7F9 BUG-5D0140CD BUG-6F69A6DF BUG-759D70A2 BUG-8742C732 BUG-8B3AED45 BUG-8DADDD64 BUG-8E1C52AE BUG-96F12329 BUG-A9A42870 BUG-AD8C5792 BUG-AF43D300 BUG-B7A075E2 BUG-D7801F5D BUG-E6D338F6 BUG-F758C3D4 BUG-F8B4EDE7 bug.2bd43612d2.governing.cockpit bug.2bd43612d2.other.cockpit bug.4402d457dd.governing.cockpit bug.4402d457dd.other.cockpit bug.701142f92e.governing.cockpit bug.701142f92e.other.cockpit bug.db79c7cf95.governing.cockpit bug.db79c7cf95.other.cockpit bug.fba4f99a60.governing.cockpit bug.fba4f99a60.other.cockpit BUG-616A0D2E

For each bug:
1. Read it: `praxis workflow bugs history <BUG-ID> --json`
2. For UI bugs, look up the referenced surface/component (Canvas canvas, console, cockpit) at the repo root
3. Judge:
   - Is the symptom user-observable, or an internal nit?
   - Does the writeup conflate multiple unrelated UI issues?
   - For 'cockpit' bugs (the dotted-form IDs): are these real or auto-generated noise?
   - Does the bug reference a surface that still exists, or stale UI?
   - Is severity calibrated against user-facing impact?

Classify each bug into ONE of:
- VALID — accurate writeup, ready to assign
- NEEDS_REWRITE — real bug but writeup misleads (say what + suggested rewrite in 1 line)
- SUSPECT — may not be real, duplicates existing work, or pre-fixed (say why)
- DUPLICATE_OF <BUG-ID> — semantic duplicate within this group

Pay special attention to the cockpit-prefixed bug IDs — these look auto-generated and may be noise.

Then produce a tackle plan:
- Order by user-impact and dependency
- Group bugs that should ship as one Canvas/cockpit PR
- Flag any bug that touches Canvas visual language (per standing order: black/white, hollow nodes, compact-idle expand-on-interact)

Output format (concise, no narrative filler):

## Validation Table
| BUG-ID | Class | One-line verdict |

## Tackle Plan
1. <bundle-name> — bugs: [...] — rationale: <one line>
2. ...

## Flags
- bugs needing operator decision before any build (and why)
- cockpit bugs that should be deduplicated/closed without further work

Use Praxis CLI tools, not generic web search. Don't trust titles alone.

Submit your review as the job result; do not call praxis_submit_code_change since this is review-only.
